u_task_1.description:
Good morning. The Axon kiosk (tablet) located in the Fire Control room in ED lobby will not allow any user - Frontline, Supervisor, or Facility Leader (myself) - to assign out a bodyworn camera (BWC). It does not acknowledge or accept a badge read to assign a specific device, nor can I access the admin settings, etc., from the tablet. 
However, the BWCs are active/seen by the charging dock (and also in my Axon Admin portal) and can be used for capturing and uploading video/audio. They just are not assigning to any specific officer, which is necessary. Axon tech support does not see an issue from their end and suggested I inquire internally whether any network configs were changed recently or if a separate assessment is possible. Please advise soon. Thank you.
*NOTE - The included device ID is from label on the bottom of the tablet. Unclear if it is a LIT ID or from Axon.
